name: Subject-hub loading branch is a spinner-forever / dead-end on stall or empty
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-01] (hub.isLoading || !hub.data) renders static Loading text with no timeout/back; a resolved-empty or stalled query parks the user forever. V2-shell gated. Fix: use TimeoutLoader/QueryStateView + split empty-data into its own state.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: SubjectHubRoute treats hub.isLoading or missing hub.data as an unconditional static loading branch, so stalled loading and settled-missing data have no timeout, retry, back, or empty/error recovery. Variants: (1) query remains loading/stalled; (2) query settles without usable hub data. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/subject-hub/[subjectId]/index.test.tsx covers both variants, fails without the fix, and proves the screen surfaces recoverable timeout/empty/error UI instead of parking on subject-hub-loading forever.
